learningObjectives: Use core work and jobs vocabulary at A2 level.
Use present simple and present continuous to talk about jobs and current work situations.
Ask and answer Wh- questions about work routines and temporary tasks.
Scan a job advertisement for specific information such as salary and shift times.
Extract factual details from a short job interview recording.
Write a short email applying for a part-time job.
Answer interview questions about work experience and career plans.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: My colleague helped me on my first day.
The salary for this job is good.
I have a job interview on Tuesday.
She wants a career in medicine.
Do you have any shop experience?

vocabularyBank.vietnameseMeaning: người sử dụng lao động / chủ lao động
vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: My employer pays me every month.
I work the morning shift on Saturdays.
She works in an office in the city centre.
The manager interviewed three people today.
I want a part-time job after school.
You should apply before the deadline.

grammarReference.explanation: Use present simple for habits, facts and permanent jobs (I work in a shop). Use present continuous for actions happening now or temporary situations (I am working extra shifts this month).
examples: I work in a bookshop every Saturday.
She is preparing for an interview this week.
My colleague usually starts his shift at nine.
They are hiring new staff at the moment.
commonMistakes: I am work in a café (×) → I work in a café (✓)
She works now on her CV (×) → She is working on her CV now (✓)
He is usually work on Fridays (×) → He usually works on Fridays (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Use Wh- words (what, where, when, who, why, how) + auxiliary (do/does/is/are/have) + subject + verb. Match the tense to the situation: present simple for routines, present continuous for now.
examples: What is your colleague doing now?
How much salary do you get?
commonMistakes: Where you work? (×) → Where do you work? (✓)
What she is doing? (×) → What is she doing? (✓)
When start your shift? (×) → When does your shift start? (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Work and Jobs Words
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand twelve work and jobs words at KET A2 level.

exercises.title: Learn: Work Word Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: A person who works with you at the same company is a _____.
questions.explanation: Colleague (đồng nghiệp) là người làm cùng công ty. Employer là chủ lao động.

choices.distractorNote: A boss, not necessarily a co-worker

questions.questionText: The money you receive each month from your job is your _____.
questions.explanation: Salary (lương) là tiền lương hàng tháng. Shift là ca làm.

questions.questionText: A formal meeting where an employer asks you questions is an _____.
questions.explanation: Interview (phỏng vấn) là buổi hỏi đáp khi xin việc. Career là sự nghiệp dài hạn.

questions.questionText: The path of jobs you have over many years is your _____.
questions.explanation: Career (sự nghiệp) là con đường nghề nghiệp lâu dài. Experience là kinh nghiệm đã có.

choices.distractorNote: Past skills, not the whole path

questions.questionText: Knowledge and skills you gain from doing a job is _____.
questions.explanation: Experience (kinh nghiệm) là kỹ năng thu được khi làm việc. Salary là tiền lương.

questions.questionText: When you stop working permanently because of age, you _____.
questions.explanation: Retire (nghỉ hưu) nghĩa là ngừng làm việc vĩnh viễn. Apply là nộp đơn.

choices.distractorNote: A meeting before getting a job

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the work words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Mỗi từ khớp với một nghĩa rõ ràng. Employer và manager thường bị nhầm.

pairs.right: the person or company that pays you to work
a fixed period of work time
working fewer hours than a full week
to send a request for a job

exercises.title: Check: Vocab Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer for each question.

questions.questionText: Ms Pham is the shop _____. She interviews new staff.
questions.explanation: Manager (quản lý) phỏng vấn nhân viên mới. Colleague là đồng cấp.

questions.questionText: Tom works three evenings a week. He has a _____ job.
questions.explanation: Part-time (bán thời gian) khi làm vài buổi/tuần. Career là sự nghiệp.

questions.questionText: Before the interview, you should _____ online with your CV.
questions.explanation: Apply (nộp đơn) là gửi đơn xin việc. Experience là kinh nghiệm.

questions.questionText: Many people work in an _____ in the city centre.
questions.explanation: Office (văn phòng) là nơi làm việc trong nhà. Interview là buổi phỏng vấn.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete the Job Sentences
exercises.instructions: Fill in each gap with the correct word.

questions.questionText: Complete: My [0] helped me prepare for the [1]. | The [2] is eight pounds an hour. | I work the evening [3] on Fridays.
questions.explanation: colleague; interview; salary; shift — bốn từ cốt lõi trong ngữ cảnh xin việc.

content.template: My [0] helped me prepare for the [1]. The [2] is eight pounds an hour. I work the evening [3] on Fridays.

exercises.title: Review: Vocab Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer for each question.

questions.questionText: Ms Pham is the shop _____. She interviews new staff.
questions.explanation: Manager (quản lý) phỏng vấn nhân viên mới. Colleague là đồng cấp.

questions.questionText: Tom works three evenings a week. He has a _____ job.
questions.explanation: Part-time (bán thời gian) khi làm vài buổi/tuần. Career là sự nghiệp.

questions.questionText: Before the interview, you should _____ online with your CV.
questions.explanation: Apply (nộp đơn) là gửi đơn xin việc. Experience là kinh nghiệm.

questions.questionText: Many people work in an _____ in the city centre.
questions.explanation: Office (văn phòng) là nơi làm việc trong nhà. Interview là buổi phỏng vấn.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Present Simple and Continuous at Work
lessons.learningObjective: Use present simple and present continuous correctly, and form Wh- questions about jobs.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose the Correct Form
exercises.instructions: Choose the best verb form for each sentence.

questions.questionText: I _____ in a bookshop every Saturday.
questions.explanation: Every Saturday = thói quen → present simple: work.

questions.questionText: She _____ for an interview right now.
questions.explanation: Right now = hành động đang diễn ra → is preparing.

questions.questionText: _____ does your shift start?
questions.explanation: Hỏi thời gian → When + does (present simple).

questions.questionText: What _____ your colleague doing at the moment?
questions.explanation: At the moment + continuous → is your colleague doing.

exercises.title: Practice: Complete the Grammar
exercises.instructions: Fill in each gap with the correct form.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] in an office. | She [1] an interview today. | [2] do you work?
questions.explanation: work (thói quen); is having (hôm nay, tạm thời); Where (hỏi địa điểm).

content.template: I [0] in an office. She [1] an interview today. [2] do you work?

questions.questionText: Complete: They [0] hiring staff this month. | My manager [1] the morning shift. | [2] is your salary?
questions.explanation: are hiring (tạm thời); works (thói quen); How much (hỏi số tiền).

content.template: They [0] hiring staff this month. My manager [1] the morning shift. [2] is your salary?

exercises.title: Check: Grammar Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer. Think carefully.

questions.questionText: My employer usually _____ me on the last Friday of the month.
questions.explanation: Usually = thói quen → pays (present simple).

questions.questionText: _____ are you working extra shifts this week?
questions.explanation: Hỏi lý do → Why + are you working (continuous).

questions.questionText: Tom _____ as a waiter, but this month he is training to be a manager.
questions.explanation: Việc thường xuyên → works; tháng này tạm thời → is training.

questions.questionText: How many hours _____ you work each week?
questions.explanation: Wh- question present simple với you → do you work.

exercises.title: Apply: Build the Sentence
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order to make a sentence.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: Where / do / you / work?
questions.explanation: Where do you work? — Wh- question present simple.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: She / is / preparing / for / an interview / now.
questions.explanation: She is preparing for an interview now. — present continuous.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: My colleague / usually / starts / his shift / at nine.
questions.explanation: My colleague usually starts his shift at nine. — present simple + adverb.

exercises.title: Review: Grammar Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer. Think carefully.

questions.questionText: My employer usually _____ me on the last Friday of the month.
questions.explanation: Usually = thói quen → pays (present simple).

questions.questionText: _____ are you working extra shifts this week?
questions.explanation: Hỏi lý do → Why + are you working (continuous).

questions.questionText: Tom _____ as a waiter, but this month he is training to be a manager.
questions.explanation: Việc thường xuyên → works; tháng này tạm thời → is training.

questions.questionText: How many hours _____ you work each week?
questions.explanation: Wh- question present simple với you → do you work.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Job Advertisement
lessons.learningObjective: Scan a job advertisement to find specific details about salary, shifts and requirements.

exercises.title: Learn: Read the Job Advert
exercises.instructions: Read the advertisement carefully. Answer the detail questions.

passage.title: Part-Time Shop Assistant — Job Advertisement
passage.text:
GREENWAY BOOKSHOP — NOW HIRING

We are looking for a friendly part-time shop assistant to join our team on weekends. The employer offers a good salary and training for the right person.

You will work with colleagues in a busy city centre shop. Duties include helping customers, organising books and working a Saturday shift from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m.

REQUIREMENTS
• At least one year of customer service experience
• Good communication skills for interviews with our manager
• Able to work on Saturday and Sunday

BENEFITS
• Hourly salary above the minimum wage
• Free books after three months
• Career advice for students who want to work in publishing

HOW TO APPLY
Send a short email with your name and work experience to jobs@greenwaybooks.co.uk before 30 April. We will contact successful candidates for an interview.

Our shop manager, Ms Pham, started here as a student. She says: "This job helped me build skills for my career."

questions.questionText: What days does the shop assistant work?
questions.explanation: REQUIREMENTS: Able to work on Saturday and Sunday.

questions.questionText: How much experience do applicants need?
questions.explanation: At least one year of customer service experience.

exercises.title: Practice: Words in the Advert
exercises.instructions: Read the advertisement again. Answer about vocabulary and meaning.

passage.title: Part-Time Shop Assistant — Job Advertisement
passage.text:
GREENWAY BOOKSHOP — NOW HIRING

We are looking for a friendly part-time shop assistant to join our team on weekends. The employer offers a good salary and training for the right person.

You will work with colleagues in a busy city centre shop. Duties include helping customers, organising books and working a Saturday shift from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m.

REQUIREMENTS
• At least one year of customer service experience
• Good communication skills for interviews with our manager
• Able to work on Saturday and Sunday

BENEFITS
• Hourly salary above the minimum wage
• Free books after three months
• Career advice for students who want to work in publishing

HOW TO APPLY
Send a short email with your name and work experience to jobs@greenwaybooks.co.uk before 30 April. We will contact successful candidates for an interview.

Our shop manager, Ms Pham, started here as a student. She says: "This job helped me build skills for my career."

questions.questionText: In the advert, 'shift' refers to _____.
questions.explanation: Saturday shift from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. = một ca làm việc cụ thể.

choices.text: a fixed period of work time

questions.questionText: Why does Ms Pham mention her own story?
questions.explanation: She says the job helped her build skills for her career — khuyến khích ứng viên.

choices.text: To show the job can help your career

exercises.title: Check: Main Idea and Order
exercises.instructions: Read the advertisement one more time. These questions need careful thinking.

REQUIREMENTS

Our shop manager, Ms Pham, started here as a student. She says: "This job helped me build skills for my career."

questions.questionText: What is the main purpose of this advertisement?
questions.explanation: Toàn bộ quảng cáo tuyển part-time shop assistant và hướng dẫn apply.

choices.text: To recruit a part-time shop assistant

questions.questionText: Put the sections in order: (1) Requirements (2) How to apply (3) Job description and benefits
questions.explanation: Thứ tự: mô tả công việc + benefits → requirements → how to apply.

exercises.title: Apply: Match Facts from the Advert
exercises.instructions: Use what you read. Match each item to the correct fact.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Job Interview
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to a job interview and extract factual information about experience, salary and shifts.

exercises.title: Learn: Café Interview
exercises.instructions: Listen to the interview. Answer the first two questions.

script.title: Job Interview at a Café

lines.speaker: Ms Lee
lines.text: Good morning, Tom. Thanks for coming to the interview today.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Good morning. I applied for the part-time waiter job last week.

lines.speaker: Ms Lee
lines.text: Tell me about your experience. Have you worked with customers before?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Yes. I worked in a bookshop for six months. My colleagues were very helpful.

lines.speaker: Ms Lee
lines.text: Great. The salary is eight pounds an hour. Can you work the evening shift on Fridays?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Yes, I can. I am studying now, but I am free on Friday evenings.

lines.speaker: Ms Lee
lines.text: Perfect. The employer will email you next Monday about the start date.

script.audioNotes: Clear interview dialogue, moderate pace. Approx. 50 seconds.

questions.questionText: What job did Tom apply for?
questions.explanation: Tom says he applied for the part-time waiter job.

questions.questionText: Where did Tom get his work experience?
questions.explanation: He worked in a bookshop for six months.

exercises.title: Practice: More from the Interview
exercises.instructions: Listen again to the same interview. Answer the next questions.

script.title: Job Interview at a Café

lines.speaker: Ms Lee
lines.text: Good morning, Tom. Thanks for coming to the interview today.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Good morning. I applied for the part-time waiter job last week.

lines.speaker: Ms Lee

lines.speaker: Ms Lee
lines.text: Perfect. The employer will email you next Monday about the start date.

script.audioNotes: Clear interview dialogue, moderate pace. Approx. 50 seconds.

questions.questionText: What is the salary?
questions.explanation: The salary is eight pounds an hour.

questions.questionText: When can Tom work?
questions.explanation: He can work the evening shift on Fridays.

exercises.title: Check: Career Advice Call
exercises.instructions: Listen to a new conversation. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: Career Advice Phone Call

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Hello. I want some advice about my career after school.

lines.speaker: Advisor
lines.text: Of course. What kind of work interests you?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I like helping people. I had an interview for a nurse assistant course yesterday.

lines.speaker: Advisor
lines.text: That is a good choice. You need more experience in a hospital. Have you thought about volunteering?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Not yet. When should I apply for training programmes?

lines.speaker: Advisor
lines.text: You should apply before September. Many students retire from study and start work at twenty.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Thank you. That helps a lot.

script.audioNotes: Friendly phone conversation, clear voices. Approx. 45 seconds.

questions.questionText: What did Linh have yesterday?
questions.explanation: She had an interview for a nurse assistant course.

choices.text: An interview for a nurse assistant course

questions.questionText: When should Linh apply for training programmes?
questions.explanation: You should apply before September.

questions.questionText: What does the advisor suggest for more experience?
questions.explanation: Have you thought about volunteering?

exercises.instructions: Listen again to the café interview. Match each item to the correct detail.

lessons.title: Lesson 5: Apply for a Job
lessons.learningObjective: Write a short email applying for a part-time job using work vocabulary and correct tenses.

exercises.title: Learn: Application Phrases
exercises.instructions: Complete each gap with a word from the box: Dear, apply, experience, salary, thank.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] Ms Pham, | I would like to [1] for the shop assistant job. | I have one year of [2]. | What is the [3]?
questions.explanation: Dear; apply; experience; salary — khung email ứng tuyển cơ bản.

content.template:
[0] Ms Pham,

I would like to [1] for the shop assistant job. I have one year of [2]. What is the [3]?

exercises.title: Practice: Build Application Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order to make correct sentences for a job email.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: I / work / in a bookshop / every Saturday.
questions.explanation: I work in a bookshop every Saturday. — present simple thói quen.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: I / am / available / for / the weekend shift.
questions.explanation: I am available for the weekend shift. — present continuous/tobe cho tình huống hiện tại.

exercises.title: Check: Job Application Email
exercises.instructions: Write an email to apply for a part-time job. Write at least 25 words.

content.taskDescription: You saw the Greenway Bookshop job advertisement. Write an email to Ms Pham to apply for the part-time shop assistant job.
prompts: Say which job you are applying for.
Say when you can work (mention a shift).
Ask a polite question about the salary or interview.
successCriteria: Clear application for the shop assistant job
Polite question about salary or interview

modelAnswer.text:
Dear Ms Pham,

I am writing to apply for the part-time shop assistant job. I worked in a café for six months and my colleagues said I am friendly with customers. I can work the Saturday shift and Sunday shift. Could you tell me when the interview is? I would like to know more about the salary too.

Thank you,
Minh

grammar.criteria: Uses present simple and/or present continuous correctly.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses work words (apply, experience, shift, salary, interview) appropriately.

organization.criteria: Email has greeting, body and polite closing.

taskAchievement.criteria: Applies for the job with experience and availability; at least 25 words.

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi ở A2.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete the Email Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the email frames with the correct unit words.

questions.questionText: Complete: Dear Manager, | I want to [0] for the evening [1]. | I have shop [2] from last summer. | [3] you, | Linh
questions.explanation: apply; shift; experience; Thank — hoàn thiện email ứng tuyển ngắn.

content.template:
Dear Manager,

I want to [0] for the evening [1]. I have shop [2] from last summer.

[3] you,
Linh

exercises.title: Review: Job Application Email
exercises.instructions: Write an email to apply for a part-time job. Write at least 25 words.

successCriteria: Clear application for the shop assistant job

questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi ở A2.

lessons.title: Lesson 6: Talk About Work
lessons.learningObjective: Answer interview questions about jobs, experience and career plans.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose the Best Reply
exercises.instructions: Imagine an examiner asks you a question. Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Where do you work? You say:
questions.explanation: Present simple + địa điểm: I work in a bookshop.

choices.text: I am work in a bookshop.
I work in a bookshop on Saturdays.

questions.questionText: Examiner: What is your colleague doing now? You say:
questions.explanation: Present continuous: is helping a customer.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Tell me about your work experience. You say:
questions.explanation: Mô tả kinh nghiệm quá khứ ngắn gọn, tự nhiên.

choices.text: I worked in a café for six months.

exercises.title: Practice: Best Response
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase you would say in each situation.

questions.questionText: Examiner: When does your shift start? You say:
questions.explanation: Trả lời thời gian cụ thể — câu trả lời phỏng vấn A2.

choices.text: It starts at nine o'clock in the morning.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Do you want a career in business? You say:
questions.explanation: Career + lý do ngắn — cấu trúc trả lời tự nhiên.

choices.text: Yes, I want interview in business.
Yes, I want a career in business because I like working with people.

questions.questionText: Examiner: What are you doing this week at work? You say:
questions.explanation: Present continuous cho tuần này: I am training with my manager.

choices.text: I train with my manager usually.
I am training with my manager this week.
I am train with my manager.

exercises.title: Check: Work and Career Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions about work. Speak for up to two minutes.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo bốn tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Situational Responses
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say in each situation.

questions.questionText: Your employer asks why you are late for your shift. You say:
questions.explanation: Xin lỗi lịch sự + lý do ngắn — phù hợp nơi làm việc.

choices.text: I'm sorry. I retire this morning.
I'm sorry. The bus was late this morning.
I'm sorry. My salary was late.

questions.questionText: A friend asks about your interview yesterday. You say:
questions.explanation: Mô tả ngắn về phỏng vấn — câu trả lời tự nhiên.

choices.text: It went well. The manager asked about my retire.
It went well. The manager asked about my experience.
It went well. I shift at the manager.

questions.questionText: The examiner asks: What is your employer like? You say:
questions.explanation: Mô tả employer — tính từ + ví dụ ngắn.

choices.text: My employer is interview and career.
My employer is fair and pays a good salary.
My employer is colleague every day.

exercises.title: Review: Work and Career Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions about work. Speak for up to two minutes.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo bốn tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.
